global_description: A medium-sized seabird with a robust, streamlined body. It has dark gray plumage on the back and wings, with a lighter gray belly. The bird features a distinctive white facial plume and a prominent, horn-like extension on its beak. The beak is thick and orange, contrasting with its dark feathers.

part_details.beak: Thick, orange, with a horn-like extension
part_details.plumage: Dark gray on back and wings, lighter gray on belly
part_details.facial_plume: White, distinctive, extending from the face

spatial_relations: The horn-like extension is on top of the beak
The white facial plume extends from the face
